message:
fix(block): accept &[u8] in stage_txn_write and scope mutex in abort_staged_txn

Change stage_txn_write to take a borrowed slice (&[u8]) instead of an
owned Vec<u8>, eliminating a redundant .to_vec() clone at the public
API boundary — the copy is now deferred to the single insertion site
inside the method.

In abort_staged_txn, narrow the mutex guard's lifetime by moving the
staged-block cleanup into an inner block so the lock is released before
the warn!() log macro runs, reducing contention on the ArcState lock
under abort-heavy workloads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
